name: Lucario

forms.name: Mega
forms.pokedexDescription: Bathed in explosive energy, its combative instincts have awakened. For its enemies, it has no mercy whatsoever.

forms.name: Midnight
forms.pokedexDescription: Its fighting style is ruthless and brutal, and it shows its opponents no mercy. Its aura is overflowing, allowing it to sense its opponent's moves before they even make them. When the eyes on its hands open, it launches bursts of aura that can turn steel into dust.

forms.name: Mega-Midnight
forms.pokedexDescription: It radiates a powerful aura due to the power of Mega Evolution. Using this power, it can fire off pulses of aura that can shatter solid diamond. It has no mercy in its heart.

forms.name: Mega-Z
forms.pokedexDescription: By completely cloaking itself in its aura, Mega Lucario Z can parry all manner of attacks, battling as if it were gracefully dancing.

pokedexDescription: By reading the auras of all things, it can tell how others are feeling from over half a mile away.
